title: Pristine Disco Diffusion settings
description: Settings for rodrigos-pristine-disco-diffusion.ipynb. Any master-settings variable may appear here; this schema documents the most-used and the 2026 additions.

text_prompts.description: Frame-indexed prompts. Key '0' is the still-image prompt list; each entry may carry a ':weight' suffix.

skip_steps.description: MAINTENANCE: >0 without an init image blends the start toward gray. Use 0 for no-init runs.

cutn_batches.description: CLIP gradient accumulation batches per step. 2 = higher quality, ~+45% step cost.

clip_guidance_scale.description: Number (classic) or 1000-entry schedule string like "[12000]*850+[26000]*150". Increasing schedules beat constant (TFG, NeurIPS 2024).

clamp_max.description: Guidance gradient clamp. 0.09 classic; values >=0.09 NaN at few-step samplers.

cut_overview.description: 1000-entry schedule; ONLY THE LAST `steps` ENTRIES EXECUTE (DD 5.61 quirk). The notebook Control Panel writes window-corrected strings automatically.

clip_ensemble.description: classic = 2021 OpenAI quartet (original DD flavor). hybrid = + LAION ViT-L. modern = LAION L+H (best semantics, ~2x guidance cost). custom = individual toggles.

quality_time_travel.description: FreeDoM mid-band resampling attempts per step. 0/1 = off, 2 recommended for finals (~+40% time).

quality_time_travel_band.description: "[start, end]" run fractions for time-travel. Default "[0.35, 0.75]".

quality_dsg.description: Experimental DSG guidance magnitude. Tested worse than classic clamp — leave false.

perf_sdpa_attention.description: FlashAttention via SDPA. Identical math. Leave true.

perf_fused_guidance.description: Single fused model pass per step. Identical math. Leave true.

perf_compile.description: torch.compile the diffusion model. One-time warmup per boot.

perf_compile_clip.description: Also compile CLIP towers. Long first-run warmup, fastest steady state.

perf_clip_streams.description: Concurrent CLIP execution. 'auto' engages only for the classic ensemble (OOM safety).

perf_guidance_interval.description: Fraction of steps receiving guidance. 1.0 = classic. 0.75 = ~20-25% faster, visually verified but not bit-identical.

perf_vectorized_cutouts.description: Batched GPU cutouts, ~10% faster, near-identical (bilinear inner-crop filter).

use_secondary_model.description: Classic fast mode: guidance through a 55MB model instead of the full UNet. Changes the look.
